name: RATHKE CLEFT CYST
definition: usually asymptomatic benign cystic sellar lesion

demographics.Histo: lined with single layer of epithelial cells; CSF / mucopolysaccharide content

dominant_finding: homogeneously high T1 SI (50%) ← high protein content
discriminating_features: variable SI ranging from hypo- to hyperintense on T1WI ← dependent on biochemical

MR: variable SI ranging from hypo- to hyperintense on T1WI ← dependent on biochemical
homogeneously high T1 SI (50%) ← high protein content
low T2 intensity (30%) ← low intracystic water content
simple / complex cyst content ± fluid-fluid level
small intracystic nodules of lower T2 + higher T1 SI (75%) ← proteinaceous concretions
wall enhancement due to squamous metaplasia / displaced rim of pituitary tissue
